Revenue: RC_VLNTRY_SRVC_IND_CD
•Add to Carrier and DME Line: LINE_VLNTRY_SRVC_IND_CD
43862 IP, SNF, Hospice, HHA, and HOP Added one new variable to each Base and Revenue for the CR-16 changes. Populated last column noting New variable and added footnote for 2020.
43709 HHA and HOP Corrected SAS long name for REVSTIND (to REV_CNTR_STUS_IND_CD) in the Hospice, HHA and HOP files.
43602 All Added new fields: 1) CLM_RSDL_PYMT_IND_CD to all base claims, and LINE_RSDL_PYMT_IND_CD to Carrier and DME
